title: selaginella sibirica
intro: Selaginella sibirica is a type of ancient, non-vascular, and primitive plant species commonly known as "spike moss" or "resurrection fern," which thrives in environments with low water and nutrient availability. It possesses medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. Selaginella sibirica is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, or used in the form of tinctures or infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
